message:
test(ft-conformance): linalg.inv numpy subprocess conformance [bd-c36b]

Adds torch_linalg_inv_numpy_subprocess_conformance covering 11
matrices: identity 3x3, diagonal 4x4, scaled identity, generic 2x2
and 3x3, permutation 3x3 (inverse is transpose), SPD tridiagonal
4x4, upper triangular 3x3, 1x1 scalar, negative-determinant 2x2,
and a mixed-sign 5x5 with moderate condition number.

Per-element relative tolerance of 1e-9 — bounded by LU-factor
conditioning. Identity / diagonal / 1x1 cases match within ~1 ULP
in practice.

Sister harness to torch_linalg_det_numpy_subprocess_conformance
and torch_linalg_slogdet_numpy_subprocess_conformance — same numpy
oracle, same fail-loud structure. Files closure for the inv slice
of frankentorch-c36b.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
